string.text: Find %s for Tokar
You need to bring Tokar some tools so he can upgrade equipment.

You know, buddy, I’m actually a pretty good tech. I can fix both weapons and armor, even do some upgrades! Well, I would… if I had proper tools. But where do you get them around here? Maybe you could help me find a simple set, huh?
I need a set of basic tools for rough work. It should have tools and oils for working with weapons. If you can get it, I’ll be grateful, I might even pay you!.. Probably.
Awesome, man! Ah, sorry, I don’t have anything to pay you with. But I can give you a good discount!
Find %s for Tokar
You need to bring Tokar fine work tools. He needs a more complete set to carry out advanced upgrades.
Hey man, if you agree to get me a more complete set, you’ll get an even bigger discount. What do you say, pal?
I need fine work tools. They’ve got everything I need. You’ll be like a brother to me if you get them!
Whoa, thanks, bro! Now I’ll definitely strike it rich. Damn, I’ll make it big!.. If I don’t blow this chance too. But for now, I can’t offer you anything better than a discount. Sorry, buddy.
Find %s for Tokar
You need to bring Tokar %s. He needs a unique set to perform even more advanced upgrades.
Hey, man, if you find something worthwhile – I’ll give you a discount!
I need calibration tools. They should have everything I need. You’ll be like a brother to me if you get them!

No fuc—! Damn, thanks, bro! Now I’ll definitely strike it rich. Hell, I’ll finally make it!.. If I don’t screw up this chance too. But for now, I can’t offer you anything better than a discount. Sorry, pal.
%s for Ukol
You need to find a kit and bring it to medic Ukol.
I need a good set of medical instruments. I can patch up light wounds fast, but for anything more serious, a simple scalpel just isn’t enough.
I need a good set of medical instruments. I can patch up light wounds fast, but for anything more serious, a simple scalpel just isn’t enough.
Thanks, friend! These instruments will save many lives. Thanks again for the tools.
